title: Iteration Protocols, Generators, and Lazy Evaluation · Evaluation Trace: Lazy Memory
summary: Process records larger than memory while exposing malformed rows at a controlled boundary. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp lazy memory increment in a bounded-memory lazy ingestion pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Measure memory and latency tradeoffs between eager and lazy transformation.
Explain generator suspension, local state retention, send points, and termination.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
